title: OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE - 211info
text: SENIOR SERVICES OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides in-home care to qualifying older adults living in their homes. Services include housekeeping, personal care, laundry, shopping, and meal preparation. Also offers case management to help older adults make cost-effective and appropriate decisions regarding their care needs. Service hours per person vary depending on assessed need and local funding amounts. Hours may range from 5-20 hours a month. Some examples of when Oregon Project Independence may be appropriate: -When an individual requires personal and home care assistance due to injury or illness -When an individual has been hospitalized and needs help while recovering in their home 1216 Moore Street Suite #214 Brookings, OR 97415 Eligibility: Age 60 and older, and individuals of any age diagnosed with Alzheimer's disease or a related disorder Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 412-8820 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 412-8820 Tammie Edgerton [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information; some services may have a waitlist FEES: Fees based on sliding scale. The cost is based on monthly household income minus monthly medical costs. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Curry County Services: Errand Running/Shopping Assistance * Alzheimer's Disease Errand Running/Shopping Assistance * Dementia Errand Running/Shopping Assistance * Older Adults Housekeeping Assistance * Alzheimer's Disease Housekeeping Assistance * Dementia Housekeeping Assistance * Older Adults In Home Meal Preparation * Alzheimer's Disease In Home Meal Preparation * Dementia In Home Meal Preparation * Older Adults Personal Care * Alzheimer's Disease Personal Care * Dementia Personal Care * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM TRANSPORTATION - ASSISTED TRANSPORTATION TRANSPORTATION - TRANSPORTATION PASSES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
